3022360.name: Maximus Mouse's Manic Mayhem
3022360.description:
Maximus Mouse is back!
Experience manic arcade action set across loads of game modes. Classic arcade gameplay with many twists and surprises awaits you!

Story

Those pesky cats have stolen Max's retirement fund! Pursue them around the world to get it back, but watch out for surprises along the way!

Party!

Grab three of your friends for some couch mayhem! Stay alive, grab those coins and capture those cheeses! Use power ups to your advantage, but beware - anything can happen: laser attacks, high winds, and lemon hitmen are just a few of the events you'll face.

Oh, and do keep an eye out for that walrus!

Trials

Pit your wits against the cats across 50+ trials. Quick, bite-sized challenges to test any mouse!

Arcade

Try your hand at the arcade modes and beat those scores!
3022360.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
